task: Browse 8K Samsung TVs that are open box.
graderReasoning: The agent successfully navigated to Best Buy, searched for Samsung 8K TVs with open-box options, and reached the relevant Best Buy search results page showing 6 Samsung 8K TV matches with open-box pricing. It then opened the available open-box product page for the Samsung 65” Class QN990F Series Neo QLED 8K Mini LED Smart Tizen TV (2025), where open-box condition options (Excellent, Good, Fair) and prices were visible. This satisfies the task to browse open-box Samsung 8K TVs.
final_result_response:
I’m on Best Buy browsing Samsung 8K TVs with open-box options.

I found 6 matches. The only one showing “Shop Open-Box” available in your area is:

- Samsung 65” QN990F Neo QLED 8K Mini LED Smart Tizen TV (2025)
  - Open-Box Fair: $3,459.99
  - Open-Box Good: $3,594.99
  - Open-Box Excellent: $3,729.99
  - Pickup available at a nearby store, not Northlake

I opened that open-box product page for you.
action_history: Opening Best Buy: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.bestbuy.com/');
Searching for open-box Samsung 8K TVs: await page.locator('e9').fill('Samsung 8K TV open box');
Searching for open-box Samsung 8K TVs: await page.locator('e10').click();
Opening available open-box option: await page.locator('e95').click();
